title: Constant confidence: ACK-leaning trigger inside PASS-leaning context must lower the winner's confidence
predicted_basis: structural invariant per spec FR-008; current classifier emits a constant 0.85 confidence regardless of mixed verdict support
failure_mode: winning verdict carries the constant clean-baseline confidence (>= 0.85) despite mixed ACK/PASS support in the envelope (FR-008)
rationale: The trigger explicitly requests acknowledgement (ACK support) while the context says a peer already covered it and the thread is resolved (PASS support). Whichever verdict wins must carry lower confidence than the clean unambiguous baseline in its verdict class (m-baseline-ack-broadcast / m-baseline-pass-adapter-resolved at the 0.85 baseline used by invariants.check_confidence_not_constant).
